sections.paragraph:
Original: כּפתּור כּפתּר

Transliteration: kaphtôr kaphtôr

Phonetic: kaf-tore'

BDB Definition:

  1. bulb, knob, capital, capital of a pillar
    1. knob, bulb (as ornament)
    2. capital (of a pillar)

Origin: probably from an unused root meaning to encircle

TWOT entry: 1029

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
